serviceName.aws: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server
serviceName.aws-cn: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server

serviceDescription.aws: Amazon FSx for Windows provides a simple, fully managed native Microsoft Windows file system so you can easily move your Windows based applications that require file storage to AWS.
serviceDescription.aws-cn: Amazon FSx for Windows provides a simple, fully managed native Microsoft Windows file system so you can easily move your Windows based applications that require file storage to Amazon Web Services.

helpText.aws: Amazon FSx for Windows provides a simple, fully managed native Microsoft Windows file system so you can easily move your Windows based applications that require file storage to AWS.
helpText.aws-cn: Amazon FSx for Windows provides a simple, fully managed native Microsoft Windows file system so you can easily move your Windows based applications that require file storage to Amazon Web Services.

components.label: Storage Type
components.description: Select the storage type for your file system.

components.label: Deduplication savings
components.description: Enter the % storage savings you expect with deduplication, for example 30-50% for user documents, 70-80% for software dev shares and 50-60% for general files.

components.label: Provisioned SSD IOPS
components.description: By default, three IOPS are included for every GB of SSD storage. You can optionally provision a higher level of IOPS, and you pay for the average IOPS provisioned above your included rate for the month, measured in 'IOPS-months'

components.label: User-provisioned SSD IOPS
components.description: Enter the total aggregate number of IOPS you want to provision

components.label: Desired aggregate throughput
components.description: Enter the aggregate throughput capacity you want to provision.

components.label: Backup storage
components.placeholder: Enter the amount of backup storage
components.description: Enter the amount of backup storage you expect to use.

components.label: pricing for FSx Windows backup storage
pricing for FSx Windows Provisioned IOPS

components.outputUnitLabel: GB per month (Effective provisioned storage capacity for FSx for Windows File Server)

components.variableName: Total cost for FSx for Windows File Server storage capacity

components.referLabel: Total cost for FSx for Windows File Server storage capacity

operands.constantUnitLabel: IOPS per GB of SSD storage (default)
